name: Azul
description: Azul is Michael Kiesling's Spiel-des-Jahres-2018-winning tile-drafting game — players take turns drafting brilliantly colored Portuguese azulejos from circular factories, fill their personal pattern lines, and slide tiles onto a 5x5 wall to score adjacency, complete rows, and complete columns. Tactile beauty, tight choices, ruthless tile-denial wars. A modern classic.
